data.current_description: Get current global position of master electronics. Expected update frequency: 1 Hz
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve current master electronics global position
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the current global position of the master electronics unit. The master position represents the satellite-based GPS and IMU position data. Expected update frequency is 1 Hz. Returns a WlSatellitePosition object containing GPS coordinates, orientation, and related metadata.
data.reasoning: Original summary uses non-standard verb form 'GetMaster' which is not action-oriented. Description lacks clarity about what 'master electronics' means in context and doesn't specify the return schema. Added domain context (satellite-based GPS/IMU), clarified the return type, and used consistent terminology from the API context.

data.current_description: [Deprecated. Use filtered] Get current unfiltered acoustic position relative to master acoustics. Expected update frequency: 4 Hz
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the current unfiltered (raw) acoustic position relative to master acoustics.
